locomo.notes: Promoted 2026-05-04. Re-baselined for the stratified smoke sample (--max-questions-per-conversation 5 → 53 questions across all 5 categories). Earlier 0.6606 baseline was from the unbounded 1986-question run and over-stated overall accuracy. Per-category sample sizes are small (6–11 questions each), so a single-question flip moves a category accuracy by ~10pp — pair this baseline with category-tolerance ≥ 0.15 in the regression gate. Latencies reflect the heavier per-question pipeline added since the previous baseline (entity_resolution + parallel-retrieve + final-rerank). Suite: test-provider, deterministic across runs.

longmemeval.notes: Promoted from results-20260423T220206Z.json. Suite: test-provider. Real-provider runs are noisier than mock; consider looser tolerances in CI (e.g. --overall-tolerance 0.04).
